criteria.pass_condition: No P0 row has failed or not_implemented disposition.
criteria.blocks_when: Any P0 row has failed or not_implemented disposition.

criteria.measurement: M5 Paneflow shadow dogfood mismatch summary
criteria.blocks_when: P0 mismatch count is greater than 0.

criteria.measurement: M5 platform rows for Windows, Linux and macOS
criteria.pass_condition: Every required platform row is pass, failed or blocked with command evidence.
criteria.blocks_when: Any platform is inferred or missing.

criteria.pass_condition: Every intended public crate packages or has an accepted blocker.
criteria.blocks_when: Any intended public crate dry-run fails without an accepted blocker.

criteria.pass_condition: Every public crate appears after its Hera dependencies.
criteria.blocks_when: Publish order is missing or cyclic.

criteria.pass_condition: No high-confidence advisory, secret or raw private artifact blocks release readiness.
criteria.blocks_when: Security report records a release-blocking finding.

criteria.pass_condition: At least one P0 compatibility, replay or dogfood blocker remains.

criteria.measurement: M5 package, platform or security rows
criteria.pass_condition: A release or platform blocker explains why host or packaging outcomes are not eligible.
criteria.blocks_when: No blocker is recorded for the fallback decision.

criteria.measurement: M5 baseline or final report owner fields
criteria.pass_condition: Every blocker has owner and follow-up story or milestone.
criteria.blocks_when: A blocker lacks owner or follow-up.
